settings.title: Niri Screensaver
settings.description: TerminalTextEffects screensaver wired into Noctalia's IdleService. Settings here write to ~/.config/niri-screensaver/config and update the idle hook automatically.

cli-missing.title: niri-screensaver CLI not found on PATH
cli-missing.desc: Install the bash side from https://github.com/jfreed-dev/niri-screensaver (run ./install.sh) and reload the plugin. Without it, the launch / kill commands below have nothing to drive.

settings.enabled-desc: Register this screensaver in Noctalia's idle hook list.
settings.idle-seconds-desc: Idle time before the screensaver activates.
settings.include-effects-desc: Restrict to this comma-separated list of TerminalTextEffects names. Empty = all available.
settings.exclude-effects-desc: Skip these effects. Ignored when Include is non-empty.
settings.fade-in-desc: Optional one-shot effect played when the screensaver appears.
settings.fade-out-desc: Optional one-shot effect played when the screensaver dismisses.
settings.random-logo-desc: Pick a different logo from the Logo directory before each effect cycle.
settings.logo-dir-desc: Override the bundled logo directory. Leave empty to use the installed share/logos/.
settings.show-clock-desc: Display the current time briefly between effect cycles.
